title: Hornsea Three Offshore Wind Farm: application for a safety zone, Energy Act 2004
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State pursuant to section 95 of the Energy Act 2004, on an application for the establishment of a safety zone in respect of an offshore energy installation.  Date of decision  22 December 2025  Company   Orsted Hornsea Project Three (UK) Limited, London   Location  65 nautical miles north east of the Norfolk coastline.  Type of project  Offshore wind farm / safety zone under the Energy Act 2004.  Maximum output  Not applicable. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
